subcodes.title: Words to Mary J. MacNutt
subcodes.first_line: Bahá'u'lláh dictated the book of Iqan to me 1275 A.H. in less than twenty-four hours…
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @suffering and imprisonment
